-- init.lua ou onde você configura os plugins com lazy.nvim
return {
  {
    'MunifTanjim/nui.nvim',
    lazy = true,
  },
  {
    'nvim-lua/plenary.nvim',
    lazy = true,
  },
  {
    'adibhanna/laravel.nvim',
    dependencies = {
      'MunifTanjim/nui.nvim',
      'nvim-lua/plenary.nvim',
    },
    ft = { 'php', 'blade' }, -- carrega quando abrir arquivos PHP/Blade
    cmd = {
      'Artisan',
      'LaravelArtisan',
      'LaravelStatus',
      'LaravelRoute',
      'LaravelMake',
      'LaravelController',
      'LaravelModel',
      'LaravelView',
      'LaravelSchema',
      'LaravelSchemaExport',
      'LaravelArchitecture',
      'LaravelClearCache',
      'LaravelCompletions',
    },
    keys = {
      { '<leader>la', ':LaravelArtisan<CR>', desc = 'Laravel Artisan' },
      { '<leader>ls', ':LaravelStatus<CR>', desc = 'Laravel Status' },
      { '<leader>lr', ':LaravelRoute<CR>', desc = 'Laravel Routes' },
      { '<leader>lm', ':LaravelMake<CR>', desc = 'Laravel Make' },
    },
    config = function()
      require('laravel').setup {
        notifications = false,
        debug = false,
      }
    end,
  },
}
